hero.label: Benchmarks
hero.title: Performance Benchmarks
hero.description: Measured performance snapshots of OfficeIMO operations on .NET 8.0, Release configuration.

scenarios.name: Word: Create 10x10 table
scenarios.notes: Table with header row and borders

scenarios.name: Excel: Write report (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot after repeated-value auto-fit deduplication, a conservative numeric/date-like auto-fit fast path, and array-backed InsertObjects buffers. Median 244.9 ms. Insert objects, table, and AutoFit on a single worksheet.

scenarios.name: Excel: Write report (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot. Median 323.4 ms. Insert table and adjust columns on a single worksheet.

scenarios.name: Excel: Read objects (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot. Median 120.6 ms. Reader path materializing dictionary-style rows.

scenarios.name: Excel: Read DataTable (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot. Median 140.2 ms. Reader path materializing a DataTable from the same workbook.

scenarios.name: Excel: Read rows (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot. Median 104.8 ms. Worksheet row iteration over the same workbook payload.

scenarios.name: Excel: Load/edit/save (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot. Median 123.4 ms. Load workbook, add review column, save to memory.

scenarios.name: Excel: Load/edit/save (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 2026-04-05 refreshed 5-sample snapshot. Median 135.5 ms. Load workbook, add review column, save to memory.
